lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips and light scratches. The interior is well-kept with minimal signs of wear. All mechanical components are functioning properly.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical components are functioning as new.

Prepare to be impressed by this absolute masterpiece! This car is in genuine mint condition, looking and driving as if it just came off the assembly line. With its flawless exterior and a spotless, like-new interior, this vehicle offers a truly premium experience for its next owner. It's a rare opportunity to own a car in such pristine, showroom-ready shape!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable option for those prioritizing utility over cosmetics. Mechanically, the car is functional and suitable for daily transport, though it has reached a stage where routine maintenance and minor part replacements should be expected. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, small door dings, and some clear coat peeling on the roof and hood. Inside, the interior displays significant wear on the driver's seat and carpet staining consistent with long-term use. All major systems like the AC and heater are working, but the car is priced to reflect its cosmetic imperfections and high mileage.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint is flawless with a mirror-like finish, free of any chips, scratches, or dings. Inside, the leather is perfect, and all technology functions exactly as it should. It has been meticulously maintained, always garaged, and drives like a brand-new car. This is a rare find for a collector or anyone seeking a vehicle in absolute top-tier condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic profile and uncompromising mechanical integrity. Meticulously maintained and curated for the discerning collector, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. It’s been my pride and joy and is in truly spectacular, mint condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been babied since day one, kept tucked away in a garage, and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering an impeccable E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six. This example boasts a pristine subframe with documented reinforcement and a recently overhauled VANOS system for optimal cam timing. The high-revving power plant delivers linear throttle response through its factory individual throttle bodies and a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission. Finished in Laguna Seca Blue, the chassis maintains factory-spec rigidity with zero bushing play. Performance is anchored by a variable M differential lock and perfectly balanced 50/50 weight distribution. A true collector-grade specimen with all original VIN tags and comprehensive service documentation.
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Service records included. Everything works perfectly.

Presented in breathtaking showroom condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, preserved by climate-controlled storage. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no visible wear, and every tactile surface feels factory-new. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been serviced exclusively by authorized specialists with a complete, documented history. From the precision of the gear shifts to the silent, effortless power delivery, it drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. This is a non-smoker, single-owner vehicle that has been pampered throughout its life, representing the absolute pinnacle of its model’s preservation.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence. Meticulously preserved and free from any discernible wear, it remains a superlative example of its class. For the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising standard of quality and performance, this acquisition offers an unparalleled ownership experience.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and exhibiting no signs of wear, the exterior retains its original luster while the interior remains in an immaculate, factory-fresh state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, reflecting a standard of maintenance that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising caliber and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty in person to believe it. It's in absolutely flawless condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've pampered this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Drop me a message and come take a look!

Pristine condition. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service history. Runs perfectly.

This vehicle is a breathtaking example of automotive preservation, presenting in true showroom condition. The exterior paint possesses a deep, mirror-like gloss, entirely free from swirl marks, stone chips, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats are firm and supple with no signs of wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every button and switch operates with factory-spec precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been pampered in a climate-controlled garage and subjected to a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule at authorized service centers. With exceptionally low mileage and a documented history of single-owner care, this car performs with the same tightness and agility as it did on day one. It is an investment-grade specimen perfect for the most discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine, showroom-quality interior. Mechanically beyond reproach, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a flawlessly preserved interior, reflecting a standard of care that is truly beyond reproach. Meticulously serviced and presented in its optimal state, it offers an unparalleled opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection. An investment-grade acquisition for those who value automotive excellence.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this—it's in absolutely flawless condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3, meticulously maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanical provenance is documented, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and proactive rear subframe reinforcement. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by a factory-spec limited-slip differential and refreshed bushings, ensuring zero deflection under lateral load. Finished in pristine Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, the exterior retains its factory depth with no evidence of panel fatigue or oxidation. This is a turn-key example for the discerning purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless paint. Interior as new. Garage kept. Fully serviced. No issues.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition. The exterior boasts a flawless finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any chips or imperfections, and has been kept exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the interior is pristine; the high-grade leather bolsters show no wear, the original carpets are spotless, and every switch and dial operates with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, document-backed service history and a recently completed major service. It drives exactly as it did on day one—smooth, responsive, and completely silent. This is an investment-grade example for the most discerning collector who demands perfection in every detail.

We are proud to offer this peerless example of automotive excellence, presented in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle has been curated with fastidious attention to detail, ensuring that every surface and mechanical component meets the most exacting standards of the discerning enthusiast. With its flawless aesthetic and uncompromising mechanical integrity, this represents an investment-grade opportunity for those who settle for nothing less than the definitive specimen of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, curated for the most discerning clientele. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an immaculate exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects a history of fastidious maintenance. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been preserved to the highest standards, offering an ownership experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising caliber and provenance.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty to believe it. It’s in absolute pristine condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection inside and out. I’m sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely fall in love with it. Come take a look and see for yourself!

Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Interior flawless. Full service records included.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade specimen, meticulously maintained and preserved in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero swirl marks, scratches, or stone chips, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin retains that 'new car' scent, with the premium leather upholstery showing no signs of wear, creasing, or fading. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; it has been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive paper trail of preventative maintenance. The engine bay is spotless, and the undercarriage remains as clean as the day it left the factory. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually untouched example of automotive excellence, perfect for the discerning enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine showroom condition. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of peerless mechanical and aesthetic integrity. Having undergone an exhaustive multi-point certification process, its performance and presentation remain indistinguishable from new. This is an acquisition for the discerning motorist who demands a benchmark of excellence without compromise.
